SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

Class TurboExpanderMapIngestion

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.expander.TurboExpanderMapIngestion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TurboExpanderMapIngestion extends Object implements Serializable
TurboExpanderMapIngestion is a utility (P4) for building auditable performance maps from digitised OEM data sheets (for example the Atlas Copco Rotoflow ACR00162 design and Case B curves). It turns tabulated points into a CompressorChartKhader2015 for the compressor side and an ExpanderChartKhader for the expander side, and lets the two certified design points be registered as anchors so the resulting model can be checked against the OEM curves.

The class deliberately does no curve fitting of its own: it forwards the digitised arrays to the existing Khader chart classes (which perform the Mach-number / sound-speed normalisation) and stores the named anchor operating points so callers can validate the assembled map.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TurboExpanderMapIngestion

      public TurboExpanderMapIngestion()
      Default constructor.

    • TurboExpanderMapIngestion

      public TurboExpanderMapIngestion(SystemInterface referenceFluid, double compressorImpellerDiameter, double expanderImpellerDiameter)
      Constructs a map-ingestion utility with a reference fluid and impeller diameters.
      Parameters:
      referenceFluid - the reference fluid the OEM curves were digitised on
      compressorImpellerDiameter - the compressor impeller outer diameter in m
      expanderImpellerDiameter - the expander impeller outer diameter in m

  • Method Details

    • addAnchorPoint

      public void addAnchorPoint(String label, double velocityRatio, double igvOpening, double expanderEfficiency)
      Register a certified anchor operating point used to validate the assembled expander map.
      Parameters:
      label - human-readable label (e.g. "Design 1998", "Case B")
      velocityRatio - velocity ratio U/C at the anchor point
      igvOpening - IGV opening (fraction of maximum area)
      expanderEfficiency - certified expander isentropic efficiency (0..1)

    • getAnchorPoints

      public List<TurboExpanderMapIngestion.AnchorPoint> getAnchorPoints()
      Get the registered anchor points.
      Returns:
      the list of anchor points

    • buildCompressorChart

      public CompressorChartKhader2015 buildCompressorChart(SystemInterface processFluid, double[] chartConditions, double[] speed, double[][] flow, double[][] head, double[][] flowPolyEff, double[][] polyEff)
      Build a Khader-style compressor chart from digitised OEM map points.
      Parameters:
      processFluid - the actual process fluid the chart will run on
      chartConditions - array with temperature [C], pressure [bara], (optionally density, molecular weight) of the reference conditions
      speed - array of speed lines in rpm
      flow - 2-D array of volumetric flows in m3/hr (one row per speed, strictly increasing per row)
      head - 2-D array of polytropic heads (one row per speed)
      flowPolyEff - 2-D array of flows for the efficiency curve (one row per speed)
      polyEff - 2-D array of polytropic efficiencies (one row per speed)
      Returns:
      the assembled compressor chart

    • buildExpanderChart

      public ExpanderChartKhader buildExpanderChart(double[] igvPositions, double[][] uc, double[][] eta, double[][] headDropKjPerKg)
      Build a Khader-style expander chart from digitised OEM map points.
      Parameters:
      igvPositions - array of IGV positions (fraction of maximum area, 0..1)
      uc - 2-D array of velocity ratios U/C (one row per IGV position)
      eta - 2-D array of isentropic efficiencies (one row per IGV position)
      headDropKjPerKg - 2-D array of isentropic stage head drops in kJ/kg (one row per IGV position)
      Returns:
      the assembled expander chart

    • validateExpanderChart

      public boolean validateExpanderChart(ExpanderChartKhader chart, double tolerance)
      Validate an assembled expander chart against the registered anchor points.
      Parameters:
      chart - the expander chart to validate
      tolerance - the allowed absolute efficiency deviation (e.g. 0.02 for 2 efficiency points)
      Returns:
      true if every anchor point is reproduced within the tolerance

    • getReferenceFluid

      public SystemInterface getReferenceFluid()
      Get the reference fluid.
      Returns:
      the reference fluid, or null if none is set

    • setReferenceFluid

      public void setReferenceFluid(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
      Set the reference fluid the OEM curves were digitised on.
      Parameters:
      referenceFluid - the reference fluid

    • getCompressorImpellerDiameter

      public double getCompressorImpellerDiameter()
      Get the compressor impeller outer diameter.
      Returns:
      the compressor impeller outer diameter in m

      public void setCompressorImpellerDiameter(double compressorImpellerDiameter)
      Set the compressor impeller outer diameter.

      compressorImpellerDiameter - the compressor impeller outer diameter in m

      Get the expander impeller outer diameter.
      Returns:
      the expander impeller outer diameter in m

      Set the expander impeller outer diameter.
      Parameters:
      expanderImpellerDiameter - the expander impeller outer diameter in m
